quotes.text: Imagination is more important than knowledge.

quotes.text: Innovation distinguishes between a leader and a follower.

quotes.text: The best way to predict the future is to create it.

quotes.text: The absence of limitations is the enemy of art.

quotes.text: Pretend you are designing clothes for all of these women.

quotes.text: The only source of knowledge is experience.

quotes.text: Do not do to others what you do not want done to yourself.

quotes.text: To be or not to be, that is the question.

quotes.text: Know thyself.

quotes.text: It is impossible for a man to learn what he thinks he already knows.

quotes.text: The mind is everything. What you think you become.

quotes.text: Everything we hear is an opinion, not a fact.

quotes.text: The greatest glory in living lies not in never falling, but in rising every time we fall.

quotes.text: Knowing is not enough, we must apply.

quotes.text: The path to enlightenment is not a path at all.

quotes.text: By three methods we may learn wisdom: First, by reflection, which is noblest.

quotes.text: The only true failure is the failure to try.

quotes.text: Whereof one cannot speak, thereof one must be silent.

quotes.text: Peace comes from within. Do not seek it without.

quotes.text: The wound is the place where the Light enters you.

quotes.text: Silence is a true friend who never betrays.

quotes.text: Everything you worry about is already okay.

quotes.text: Respond, don't react.

quotes.text: Calm is contagious.

quotes.text: Bloom where you are planted.

quotes.text: You are braver than you believe, stronger than you seem, and smarter than you think.

quotes.text: The worst that can happen is they say no.

quotes.text: What you think, you become.

quotes.text: The wound is the place where the Light enters you.

quotes.text: Talent is a pursued interest. Anything you are willing to practice, you can do.

quotes.text: Genius is one percent inspiration and ninety-nine percent perspiration.

quotes.text: We are what we repeatedly do. Excellence, then, is not an act, but a habit.

quotes.text: Do nothing which is of no use.

quotes.text: Your work is going to fill a large part of your life, and the only way to be truly satisfied is to do what you believe is great work.

quotes.text: Work is love made visible.

quotes.text: Be the change that you wish to see in the world.

quotes.text: I have a dream.

quotes.text: In a gentle way, you can shake the world.

quotes.text: The measure of intelligence is the ability to change.

quotes.text: We accept the love we think we deserve.

quotes.text: You yourself, as much as anybody in the entire universe, deserve your love and affection.

quotes.text: The only way to predict the future is to create it.

quotes.text: If you are the smartest person in the room, then you're in the wrong room.

quotes.text: Every man is guilty of all the good he did not do.

quotes.text: Leadership is not about being in charge. It's about taking care of those in your charge.

quotes.text: The key to success is to focus on goals, not obstacles.

quotes.text: Every moment is a fresh beginning.

quotes.text: Every expert was once a beginner.

quotes.text: To lead people, walk beside them.
quotes.author: Unknown

quotes.text: The unexamined life is not worth living, but neither is the life spent examining it.

quotes.text: The hardest part of knowing the truth is learning what to do with it.
quotes.author: Unknown

quotes.text: We cannot see what we are not ready to see.
quotes.author: Ralph Waldo Emerson

quotes.text: Success usually comes to those who are too busy to be looking for it.

quotes.text: Discipline is remembering what you want.
